name: French Style Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon instant beef bouillon or chicken bouillon
3 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
To Prepare Salad: Bring 1 cup of water to a boil and add 1/2 teaspoon salt. Heat until boiling, then add potatoes. Return to boiling. Reduce heat and cover pot. Cook until tender (30-35 minutes). Drain, cool, and peel potatoes. Rub the inside of a 2-quart bowl with garlic; discard garlic. Slice potatoes into 1/4-inch pieces and place in the bowl. Dissolve bouillon in hot water. Add wine. Pour over potatoes. Cover and refrigerate for several hours, stirring occasionally.
To Prepare Dressing: Shake all ingredients together in a tightly covered jar. Gently toss with potatoes. Sprinkle with parsley. Garnish with tomato wedges if desired.
